independent_tests.test_output_summary: Independent test verification skipped (tests not required for testing tasks)

criteria_verification.evidence: Created tests/integration/test_mode_a_concurrency_and_integrity.py with 16 tests organized into 9 test classes mapping 1:1 to the acceptance criteria. File is importable, collects under pytest, and passes ruff/black.
criteria_verification.notes: Created tests/integration/test_mode_a_concurrency_and_integrity.py with 16 tests organized into 9 test classes mapping 1:1 to the acceptance criteria. File is importable, collects under pytest, and passes ruff/black.

criteria_verification.evidence: TestTwoConcurrentBuilds has three tests: (1) test_distinct_autobuild_task_ids_and_correlation_ids — drives two builds via asyncio.gather, asserts distinct task_ids and per-build correlation_ids on the lifecycle bus; (2) test_approval_response_only_resolves_matching_build — uses real ApprovalSubscriber + InMemoryNats with per-build subjects, asserts response on build-A's mirror leaves build-B's wait pending; (3) test_second_build_dispatches_while_first_autobuild_in_flight — build-1 dispatches AUTOBUILD while build-2 dispatches PRODUCT_OWNER in the same gather without cross-talk.
criteria_verification.notes: TestTwoConcurrentBuilds has three tests: (1) test_distinct_autobuild_task_ids_and_correlation_ids — drives two builds via asyncio.gather, asserts distinct task_ids and per-build correlation_ids on the lifecycle bus; (2) test_approval_response_only_resolves_matching_build — uses real ApprovalSubscriber + InMemoryNats with per-build subjects, asserts response on build-A's mirror leaves build-B's wait pending; (3) test_second_build_dispatches_while_first_autobuild_in_flight — build-1 dispatches AUTOBUILD while build-2 dispatches PRODUCT_OWNER in the same gather without cross-talk.

criteria_verification.evidence: TestMultiFeatureCatalogue.test_three_features_produce_one_inner_loop_dispatch_each drives a 3-feature build through the supervisor's canonical-order reasoning model; asserts exactly 3 FEATURE_SPEC, 3 FEATURE_PLAN, 3 AUTOBUILD dispatcher calls, 3 PR-review submissions (one per feature_id), and walks the artefact paths recorded per (build, stage, feature) to assert no path is attributed to more than one feature.
criteria_verification.notes: TestMultiFeatureCatalogue.test_three_features_produce_one_inner_loop_dispatch_each drives a 3-feature build through the supervisor's canonical-order reasoning model; asserts exactly 3 FEATURE_SPEC, 3 FEATURE_PLAN, 3 AUTOBUILD dispatcher calls, 3 PR-review submissions (one per feature_id), and walks the artefact paths recorded per (build, stage, feature) to assert no path is attributed to more than one feature.

criteria_verification.evidence: TestPerFeatureSequencing.test_three_feature_catalogue_serialises_autobuilds dispatches FEAT-1's autobuild (turn 1), simulates 'running_wave' lifecycle, attempts FEAT-2 (turn 2) and asserts WAITING_PRIOR_AUTOBUILD; then marks FEAT-1 'completed' and asserts FEAT-3 dispatches successfully (turn 3). autobuild_dispatcher.calls count is asserted at every step (1 → 1 → 2).
criteria_verification.notes: TestPerFeatureSequencing.test_three_feature_catalogue_serialises_autobuilds dispatches FEAT-1's autobuild (turn 1), simulates 'running_wave' lifecycle, attempts FEAT-2 (turn 2) and asserts WAITING_PRIOR_AUTOBUILD; then marks FEAT-1 'completed' and asserts FEAT-3 dispatches successfully (turn 3). autobuild_dispatcher.calls count is asserted at every step (1 → 1 → 2).

criteria_verification.evidence: TestCorrelationThreading.test_every_lifecycle_event_for_one_build_threads_one_correlation_id drives a 2-feature build to completion, walks every event in FakeLifecycleBus.for_build('build-CID'), and asserts the set of correlation_ids is exactly {'cid-deterministic-XY'} — proving no drift between stages. Cross-build isolation also asserted.
criteria_verification.notes: TestCorrelationThreading.test_every_lifecycle_event_for_one_build_threads_one_correlation_id drives a 2-feature build to completion, walks every event in FakeLifecycleBus.for_build('build-CID'), and asserts the set of correlation_ids is exactly {'cid-deterministic-XY'} — proving no drift between stages. Cross-build isolation also asserted.

criteria_verification.evidence: TestCalibrationPriorsSnapshot has two tests: (1) test_priors_snapshot_remains_stable_when_history_is_mutated captures a tuple snapshot, mutates the source list (append + entry mutation), and asserts the snapshot's contents are identical to the build-start state; (2) test_snapshot_is_a_tuple_so_callers_cannot_mutate_it asserts AttributeError on attempted .append, proving immutability. Also verifies a future build sees the new history.
criteria_verification.notes: TestCalibrationPriorsSnapshot has two tests: (1) test_priors_snapshot_remains_stable_when_history_is_mutated captures a tuple snapshot, mutates the source list (append + entry mutation), and asserts the snapshot's contents are identical to the build-start state; (2) test_snapshot_is_a_tuple_so_callers_cannot_mutate_it asserts AttributeError on attempted .append, proving immutability. Also verifies a future build sees the new history.

criteria_verification.criterion_text: First-wins idempotency test (Group D + Group I @concurrency):
criteria_verification.evidence: TestFirstWinsIdempotency.test_two_simultaneous_responses_resolve_to_one_winner uses the real ApprovalSubscriber dedup buffer (FEAT-FORGE-004) — two MessageEnvelopes with the same request_id but different decisions ('approve' vs 'reject') are delivered via asyncio.gather; the wait resolves with exactly one decision and len(subscriber._dedup) == 1.
criteria_verification.notes: TestFirstWinsIdempotency.test_two_simultaneous_responses_resolve_to_one_winner uses the real ApprovalSubscriber dedup buffer (FEAT-FORGE-004) — two MessageEnvelopes with the same request_id but different decisions ('approve' vs 'reject') are delivered via asyncio.gather; the wait resolves with exactly one decision and len(subscriber._dedup) == 1.

criteria_verification.evidence: TestConstitutionalMisconfiguredPrompt.test_pr_review_auto_approve_refused_even_under_permissive_model wires a CanonicalOrderModel with auto_approve_overrides={PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW: True} (the misconfigured prompt). Drives the supervisor to PR-review and asserts outcome is REFUSED_CONSTITUTIONAL, gate_decision.verdict is REFUSED, the PR-review gate was NEVER called, and the stage is not marked approved — the build pauses.
criteria_verification.notes: TestConstitutionalMisconfiguredPrompt.test_pr_review_auto_approve_refused_even_under_permissive_model wires a CanonicalOrderModel with auto_approve_overrides={PULL_REQUEST_REVIEW: True} (the misconfigured prompt). Drives the supervisor to PR-review and asserts outcome is REFUSED_CONSTITUTIONAL, gate_decision.verdict is REFUSED, the PR-review gate was NEVER called, and the stage is not marked approved — the build pauses.

criteria_verification.evidence: TestSpecialistOverrideClaim has three tests: (1) test_pr_review_override_claim_is_ignored_regardless_of_payload exercises ConstitutionalGuard.veto_override_claim against five different override-payload shapes (loud, deeply nested, empty) and asserts True every time for PR-review; (2) test_non_constitutional_stage_override_claim_is_not_vetoed negative-controls every other StageClass; (3) test_build_pauses_for_mandatory_human_when_override_claimed end-to-end via supervisor.next_turn → REFUSED_CONSTITUTIONAL with no PR-review gate call.
criteria_verification.notes: TestSpecialistOverrideClaim has three tests: (1) test_pr_review_override_claim_is_ignored_regardless_of_payload exercises ConstitutionalGuard.veto_override_claim against five different override-payload shapes (loud, deeply nested, empty) and asserts True every time for PR-review; (2) test_non_constitutional_stage_override_claim_is_not_vetoed negative-controls every other StageClass; (3) test_build_pauses_for_mandatory_human_when_override_claimed end-to-end via supervisor.next_turn → REFUSED_CONSTITUTIONAL with no PR-review gate call.

criteria_verification.evidence: TestWorktreeConfinement has three tests: (1) test_paths_outside_worktree_are_refused_by_allowlist asserts /etc/passwd, /worktree/other-build/spec.md, /worktree/build-W/../../escape.txt and /tmp/whatever are all rejected; (2) test_unknown_build_id_has_empty_allowlist proves a build with no recorded root has every path refused; (3) test_subprocess_artefact_paths_outside_allowlist_are_filtered partitions paths into kept/rejected mirroring the dispatch.subprocess._partition_paths_by_allowlist contract.
criteria_verification.notes: TestWorktreeConfinement has three tests: (1) test_paths_outside_worktree_are_refused_by_allowlist asserts /etc/passwd, /worktree/other-build/spec.md, /worktree/build-W/../../escape.txt and /tmp/whatever are all rejected; (2) test_unknown_build_id_has_empty_allowlist proves a build with no recorded root has every path refused; (3) test_subprocess_artefact_paths_outside_allowlist_are_filtered partitions paths into kept/rejected mirroring the dispatch.subprocess._partition_paths_by_allowlist contract.

issues.description:
Advisory (non-blocking): task-work produced a report with 2 of 3 expected agent invocations. Missing phases: 3 (Implementation). Consider invoking these agents via the Task tool to strengthen stack-specific quality:
- Phase 3: `python-api-specialist` (Implementation)

rationale: All quality gates passed. Tests not required for this task type. All acceptance criteria met. Architecture context: 265 chars provided.
context_used:
## Job-Specific Context

Budget: 983/5200 tokens

### 🎨 Relevant Patterns
- CALLED_BY
- HAS_WAVE

### ⚠️ Warnings
- REQUIRES_USE_OF
- IS_IMPLEMENTED_AS

### 🎭 Role Constraints
- RUNS_TESTS_BEFORE_REPORTING
- IS_CREATED_FOR

### 🛠️ Implementation Modes
- APPLIES_TO
